mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_price (item_id, price1, price2, price3) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{price1}, #{price2}, #{price3})
INSERT INTO item_stock (item_id, item_name, current_cnt, last_updated) VALUES(#{id}, #{itemName}, 0, now())
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.item_name, i.current_cnt, p.price1, p.price2, p.price3, p.create_at FROM items i LEFT JOIN (select p2.* From (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY item_id ORDER BY create_at DESC) AS rn FROM item_price) p2 where p2.rn = 1) p ON p.item_id = i.id WHERE i.item_name like CONCAT('%',#{itemName},'%')
SELECT customer FROM item_history WHERE customer like CONCAT('%',#{customer},'%') GROUP BY customer
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO item_history ( customer, customer_tel,date , item_idx, item_name, cnt, type, created_at) VALUES
( #{customer}, #{customerTel}, #{date}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.cnt}, #{type}, now() )
mapper.select:
SELECT h.id, h.created_at, p.start_date, p.end_date, i.item_name, h.cnt, h.customer, h.customer_tel, h.type, p.price1, p.price2, p.price3 FROM item_history h left join items i on h.item_idx = i.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_id,price1,price2,price3, create_at AS start_date, LEAD(create_at) OVER (PARTITION BY item_id ORDER BY create_at) AS end_date FROM item_price ) p ON i.id = p.item_id WHERE 1=1
AND h.created_at >= p.start_date AND (h.created_at < p.end_date or p.end_date is null)
AND h.date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
AND h.item_name like concat('%',#{itemName},'%')
AND h.customer like concat('%',#{customer},'%')
AND h.type = #{type}
ORDER BY date desc
